crime.value: Murder with body disposal - unclear who was killed and by whom
crime.quote: How was she going to fix this mess in her apartment and what to do with the body?

victim.value: Unidentified person killed in Sal's apartment
victim.quote: what to do with the body?

culprit_and_motive.value: Possibly Sal in self-defense against Jeremy Lawrence or unknown attacker
culprit_and_motive.quote: she had been living at Jamaica, Queens for three years

investigator.value: Multiple third-person perspectives including Sal and Carla Stanfield
investigator.quote: Sal sat in the floor of her apartment and asked herself

social_world.value: Business hierarchy with customer service focus, family care dynamics, Northern California criminal justice system
social_world.quote: The customer is more important than the event or the wedding

investigator_wound.value: Carla's emotional trauma related to an old friend who helped her in hard times but has disappeared
investigator_wound.quote: Oh, old friend where are you right now?

_meta.title: ebook hans bernard the perfect murder
